diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -28,15 +28,19 @@
     with open(os.path.join(args.checkpoint, "handler.pkl"), "rb") as f:

         handler = pickle.load(f)

         

-    handler.process_type = DataHandlerLP.PT_I

     handler.start_time = test_period[0]

     handler.end_time = test_period[1]

+    handler.setup_data(enable_cache=False)

     

     dataset = DatasetH(

         handler=handler,

         segments={"test": test_period}

     )

     

+    df_features = dataset.prepare("test", col_set="feature", data_key=DataHandlerLP.DK_L)

+    if df_features is None or len(df_features) == 0:

+        raise ValueError("No features generated for the test period!")

+        

     models = []

     for i in range(5):

         model_path = os.path.join(args.checkpoint, f"model_{i}.pkl")

@@ -50,12 +54,12 @@
             

     preds = []

     for model in models:

-        pred = model.predict(dataset, segment="test")

-        if isinstance(pred, pd.Series):

-            pred = pred.to_frame("score")

+        p = model.model.predict(df_features.values)

+        pred = pd.Series(p, index=df_features.index, name="score")

         preds.append(pred)

         

     avg_pred = sum(preds) / len(preds)

+    avg_pred = avg_pred.to_frame("score")

     

     instruments = D.instruments(universe)

     raw_labels = D.features(instruments, ["$close", "Ref($close, -1) / $close - 1"], start_time=test_period[0], end_time=test_period[1])
